decision: Social posts harvester — Facebook + LinkedIn ingestion

steps.notes: Social posts collection shipped: interface, pod service, handler, 3 views, routes, navbar, mind map. Platform filter (facebook/linkedin). Manual add + future GDPR data export ingest. No live API integration — approach is file-based per brief.
Review pass: interface clean with platform field, pod service follows RDF patterns with proper escaping, XSS-safe views with nonce, platform filter client-side. No injection risks. Ship it.
